testcase.name: POST /api/Feedbacks
testcase.failure:
1. Test Case ID: AbC123
- Server error
[500] Internal Server Error
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST https://host.com/api/Feedbacks -d '{"rating": -2147483648}'

testcase.name: GET /rest/products/{id}/reviews
testcase.failure:
1. Test Case ID: XyZ789
- Undocumented HTTP status code
Received: 405 Documented: 200
[405] Method Not Allowed

2. Test Case ID: XyZ790
- Response violates schema
'id' is a required property
